notes: Strong repeat relationship; opens around 15% under ask, closes within 3 rounds, pays same day via bank transfer. Highly reliable, trusted buyer with consistent order volumes.
Established but modest history; typically opens 25% under ask, negotiates 4-5 rounds before agreeing, pays within 2 business days. Reasonably reliable repeat buyer.
Limited past dealings; opens aggressively at 40% under ask, tends to close within 6-7 rounds after concessions, pays within 3-5 days. Some payment delays noted once.
First contact, no prior deal history. No established negotiation pattern or payment track record yet; treat as new/unverified counterparty.
